summary:
Claim: False-positive results compromise accurate interpretation of tuberculin test.  
Evidence: - BCG vaccination induces cross-reactive immune response to non-TB mycobacteria. - Cross-reactivity leads to false-positive skin test reactions, increasing diagnostic ambiguity.  
Answer: A
